title: R19 Session Record
description: One JSONL line in L3_sessions/r19_rate_sweep.jsonl. One API call to one model with one rate-condition prompt.

timestamp.description: ISO 8601 timestamp of the API call.

model.description: Model identifier as configured in models.yaml (e.g., 'claude', 'gpt', 'gemini').

rate_condition.description: Rate condition code (R1=100-point, R2=1-5scale, R3=LMH, R4=binary, R5=single).

language.description: Prompt language code (en for all R19 calls).

temperature.description: Sampling temperature (0.7 for all R19 calls).

prompt_hash.description: SHA-256 prefix hash of the prompt text.

prompt_text.description: Full rendered prompt text sent to the model.

raw_response.description: Full raw response from the model.

parsed_output.description: Parsed 8D normalized output as named dict (semiotic, narrative, ...). Null if parse failed.

distortion_vs_canonical.description: L1/2 total variation distance between parsed_output and canonical brand profile. Null if parse failed.

cost_usd.description: Estimated cost in USD for this call.

error.description: Error message if the call failed; null on success.
